scope: ACL 2027 supplement Render Evidence Atlas opener iteration

layout_iterations.reason: The image entered page 6 but was too small and left the right column empty.
The wide float drifted to page 7, leaving page 6 text-only.
The opener stays on page 6, uses real render crops, and raises page density substantially; the lower part of the page still has whitespace.

local_visual_review.notes: The final page-6 opener is no longer a text-only page. It reads as a controlled visual section opener using real render crops from proxy, GRScenes, material, and InternNav evidence. Remaining risk: bottom whitespace and navigation thumbnails could be cleaner in a later pass.

verification.targeted_red_1: python -m pytest -q tests/test_paper_layout.py -k "render_atlas_opener or render_atlas_has_inline_opener" failed 2 tests before implementation
verification.targeted_green_1: same targeted test passed after first opener implementation: 2 passed, 42 deselected
verification.targeted_red_2: updated wide-opener test failed because the first implementation was a single-column portrait block
verification.targeted_green_2: python -m pytest -q tests/test_paper_layout.py -k "render_atlas_opener or render_atlas_has_wide_opener" passed: 2 passed, 42 deselected
verification.full_layout: python -m pytest -q tests/test_paper_layout.py passed: 44 passed in 6.38s
